summary: Keep in-progress or returned timesheets out of the reviewed approvals list.

notes: No database schema, RLS, RPC, or data repair migrations are included.
Production diagnosis found 酒波 2026-06-08 was still submitted/running, so it should not appear as a final reviewed timesheet.
Reviewed weekly timesheets now include only final statuses: approved, locked, or summarized.
Submitted, draft, rejected, or revision-required sheets with reviewer action history no longer appear in the reviewed tab.
Final timesheet statuses are trusted over historical graph-node rejection states when deriving display status.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run test:e2e:prod -- --grep "review approval audit helpers".
Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.32 and production VITE variables.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.32.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.32.
Verify 酒波 2026-06-08 remains submitted/running in the database but is no longer eligible for reviewed-list display.
known_warnings: Returned or still-running approval chains remain visible through pending/in-progress flows where applicable.
Vite may still warn that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
